--- CycloneDDS XML (Jetson: /home/unitree/unitree_ros2/cyclonedds_ws/src/cyclonedds.xml) ---

<CycloneDDS>
  <Domain Id="any">
    <General>
      <Interfaces>
        <NetworkInterface name="enp0s31f6" priority="default" multicast="default" />
      </Interfaces>
    </General>
  </Domain>
</CycloneDDS>

--- CycloneDDS XML (PC: /home/careslab/unitree_ros2/cyclonedds_ws/src/cyclonedds.xml) ---
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<CycloneDDS>
  <Domain Id="any">
    <General>
      <Interfaces>
        <NetworkInterface name="enp0s31f6" priority="default" multicast="default" />
      </Interfaces>
      <MaxMessageSize>65500B</MaxMessageSize>
      <FragmentSize>4000B</FragmentSize>
    </General>
    <Internal>
      <DefragReliableMaxSamples>16</DefragReliableMaxSamples>
      <DefragUnreliableMaxSamples>16</DefragUnreliableMaxSamples>
    </Internal>
  </Domain>
</CycloneDDS>
